response.justification: Exceptional full-stack developer with strong open-source credentials, but fundamentally misaligned for Head of Development. Critical gaps include German language proficiency (Basic vs. required C1), complete absence of demonstrated team leadership experience, and no IT consulting or strategic advisory background. All roles are individual contributor positions despite senior titles. Better suited for a Senior/Staff Engineer position.
strengths: Deep open-source expertise with successful GISCollective platform and multiple published libraries, directly aligned with company's specialization
Exceptional technical breadth across diverse languages, platforms, and domains with proven ability to rapidly master new technologies
Strong communication and knowledge-sharing demonstrated through workshops, FOSS4G conference talks, and community-led training courses
concerns: German language proficiency is "Basic" when position requires minimum C1 for senior leadership role in German company
Career consists entirely of individual contributor positions (Developer, Senior Developer, Staff Engineer); no demonstrated team leadership, mentoring, or management experience
Background lacks IT consulting and client advisory experience; all roles in product/startup environments, not consulting or strategic advisory contexts

key_factors.factor: No team leadership or management experience
